display_html:
class SpecTranslate ctx a where
  • type SpecRep a ∷ Type
  • toSpecRep ∷ a → SpecTransM ctx (SpecRep a)
name: SpecTranslate SpecRep toSpecRep

display_html:
class FixupSpecRep a where
  • fixup ∷ a → a
name: FixupSpecRep fixup

display_html: runSpecTransM ∷ ctx → SpecTransM ctx a → Either SpecTranslationError a
name: runSpecTransM

name: askCtx

name: withCtx

display_html: toTestRep ∷ (SpecTranslate ctx a, FixupSpecRep (SpecRep a)) ⇒ a → SpecTransM ctx (SpecRep a)
name: toTestRep

display_html: unComputationResult_ ∷ ComputationResult Void a → Either e a
name: unComputationResult_
